item.title: Yash Savani (About)
item.description: Yash Savani Ph.D. Candidate Computer Science Department Carnegie Mellon University ysavani AT cs DOT cmu DOT edu About Me Hi! I’m a first-year Ph.D. candidate in the Comptuer Science Department at Carnegie Mellon University. My current research interests include statistical learning theory, optimization, and deep learning. Education Ph.D. in Computer Science (0.00 / 0.00) Carnegie Mellon University | Pittsburgh, PA | 2021 - Current M.
